theme: Light (Warm Canvas) - A gallery aesthetic to let the art shine.

headings.instruction: NEVER use Inter for headings. Headings must feel like an editorial art exhibition catalog. Use italic variants for sub-headings or artistic flair.

body.instruction: Clean, highly readable geometric sans for descriptions, prices, and UI elements.

labels_and_buttons.instruction: Use for overlines, categories, and primary CTAs.

colors.rules: Avoid large fields of highly saturated color. The UI should remain muted and elegant (like a physical gallery wall), letting the artwork provide the color. Use Cinnamon Terracotta exclusively for primary actions (bids, buy now).

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (The Gallery Wall). Art needs breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.scale: Use 2x-3x standard spacing. Rely on p-12, p-16, p-24, and p-32 for section padding.

grids.gallery_view: MODE A (The 'Tetris' Grid). Break symmetry. Mix col-span-4, col-span-8, row-span-2 for artwork. Never make a perfect grid of squares.
grids.dashboard_view: MODE B (High Density Grid). For artist dashboards/analytics, use tight gaps (gap-6) and clear hierarchy.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense text. Center-align only major section headers. Artwork should often be asymmetrically aligned to create visual tension.

surface_strategies.artwork_cards: Cardless design. No heavy shadows. Use flat presentation with subtle 1px border-border if needed, or simply rely on image and proximity for structure. On hover, apply an extremely soft, diffuse drop-shadow and a micro-lift (-translate-y-1).
surface_strategies.navigation: Glassmorphism (Crystal Variant). High blur (backdrop-blur-xl), bg-white/70, with a delicate 1px border-b border-white/40.
surface_strategies.dashboard_panels: Flat background with 1px border, 0px radius (sharp) or very subtle rounded-sm. No soft muddy UI.

motion.scrolling: Smooth scrolling is MANDATORY. Use lenis for premium momentum scrolling.
motion.interactions: Image zoom on hover for artwork (scale-105 with long transition duration 0.7s ease-out). Fade-in and subtle translation for staggered list entrances.
motion.page_transitions: Fade to white/light-grey between pages, not instant harsh jumps.

components_and_ui.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none) or very slight (rounded-sm). Use solid Ceylon Sapphire or Cinnamon Terracotta for primary actions. Hover states must shift text/bg color, not just opacity.
components_and_ui.inputs: Shadcn standard but customized: border-b only (flair-less minimalist) or sharp rectangular boxes with border-border. Focus state must be a sharp 1px ring of Ceylon Sapphire.
components_and_ui.modals_dialogs: Use Shadcn Dialog. Backdrop must be heavily blurred (backdrop-blur-md) with a dark tint (bg-black/40). Modal content surface must be pure white (#FFFFFF).
components_and_ui.badges: For 'Auction', 'Sold', 'Available'. Small, tracking-widest, uppercase. E.g., 'Auction' -> bg-ceylon-sapphire text-white px-2 py-1 text-[10px].

image_urls.description: Colorful abstract acrylic painting (Use for Featured Art/Hero placeholder)
Traditional Sri Lankan masks on wall (Use for Traditional category/Cultural context)
Elegant interior of an art museum gallery (Use for About page or Hero background)
Art gallery with framed works on white walls (Use for Exhibition/Gallery section)
Artist by painting (Use for Artist Profile placeholder)
Intricate stone carving of Hindu deity in Sri Lanka (Use for Heritage/Traditional Art collection)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all body text meets APCA standards against the #FDFDFB background. Never use text lighter than #5C636A on light backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring. Do not rely solely on outline-none.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the lenis smooth scroll and heavy transitions.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-end art gallery e-commerce site, not a standard SaaS dashboard. Treat the white space as a canvas.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing/gallery front-end to ensure structural freedom (asymmetric grids).
Use Shadcn components heavily customized (removed borders, sharper radii) for interactive logic like Cart, Checkout, Auth, and Dashboard panels.
Do NOT center align the app container. Respect optical alignment.
Do NOT use placeholder text for logos or missing content. Use the provided image URLs.
Install and use `@phosphor-icons/react` with `weight='light'` or `weight='thin'` for an elegant, non-intrusive icon set.
Do NOT use complete transparent backgrounds for the sticky header; apply glassmorphism instead.
Incorporate subtle grain texture overlay (`mix-blend-multiply`, `opacity-5`) on the main background to make it feel like paper/canvas rather than digital pixels.
Add `data-testid` to all buttons, links, and forms for testing.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not converge toward generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. No simplistic gradients or universal transitions (`transition: all`).
Create depth through layered design elements and z-index hierarchy.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, custom cursors, etc).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Use named exports for components, default exports for pages.
